div.p: Over 30 years of expertise in laboratory chemicals, equipment, and scientific instruments across Saudi Arabia.

div.class: col-lg-3 col-md-6 col-6 s_col_no_bgcolor pt8 pb8
col-lg-3 col-md-6 col-6 s_col_no_bgcolor pt8 pb8
col-lg-3 col-md-6 col-6 s_col_no_bgcolor pt8 pb8
col-lg-3 col-md-6 col-6 s_col_no_bgcolor pt8 pb8

div.p: Over more than 30 years as distributor or Agent for Equipment of laboratories, and the Analysis of the water in Kingdom.

Alajlabchem has continuously accompanied its customers across multiple market segments in a wide range of industries including Petrochemicals, Oil and Gas, Pharmaceuticals, Food and Beverage, Water Treatment, Research Institutes, and Government Agencies.

h3.a: Featured: Innovation in Chemical Analysis Technology and Research
